hyperedges.label: Signal-to-Trade Pipeline: indicators feed strategy scoring which triggers portfolio execution
Self-Learning Feedback Loop: closed trades update pattern stats which adjust signal weights in next scan
Dashboard aggregates portfolio state, trade history, and pattern stats for live display
